---

## name: Downstream impact follow-up
about: Canonical messaging changed (or will); surfaces outside this repo must update or someone must explicitly accept drift
title: "[Downstream] "
labels: ["Content & messaging"]
assignees: ''

## Use this template when

- A **merge or planned change** in `percona-messaging` will make **another property** (docs site, marketing pages, hub, product UI, partner listings, etc.) **wrong, stale, or contradictory** unless someone acts.
- You need a **single coordination issue** with **links both ways** (upstream PR/issue here ↔ downstream tickets).

## Use a different template when

- Work stays **inside this repo only** → **[Messaging change or update](https://github.com/percona/percona-messaging/issues/new?template=messaging-change-update.md)** or **[Product release update](https://github.com/percona/percona-messaging/issues/new?template=product-release-update.md)**.
- You are still **scoping what to change in canonical files** → **Messaging intake and decomposition**.

## Upstream (this repo)


|                            |     |
| -------------------------- | --- |
| **PR / issue**             |     |
| **Merged or target merge** |     |


## Impact (one screen)

**What downstream readers will see wrong if nobody acts:** 

**Severity:**  P0 launch blocker / P1 important soon / P2 backlog

## Downstream surfaces (check + link)



- Docs (public docs / versioned pages) — issue/PR:
- Web / marketing (`percona.com`, campaigns, landing) — issue/PR:
- Hub / newsletter / GTM assets — issue/PR:
- Product UI / in-app copy — issue/PR:
- Partner or ecosystem listings — issue/PR:
- Other:  — issue/PR:

## Acceptance

- Every checked surface above has an **owner** and **linked** downstream issue or PR, **or** an explicit **“accept drift until …”** note in a comment with approver.
- No remaining **customer-facing contradiction** between this repo and checked surfaces for the scope of the upstream change.
